titleStmt.title: SII 19.102: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 102. (A.R. No. 495 of 1918.) TIRUVEṆKĀḌU, SIRGALI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE WEST INNER gōpura, ŚVĒTĀRAṆYĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is damaged. It seems to record a gift of some gold ornaments for the image of Naṭarāja (Āḍi-aruḷugiṉṟa-dēvar) in the temple at Tiruveṇkāḍu, by a kaikkōḷa. Below this is the latter portion of another inscription, which seems to register the leasing out of a temple land to a resident of Nallāvūr, who was to reclaim the land for cultivation and supply paddy to the temple every year at the rate of a kuṟuni per day for offerings.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecari-pa
nmaṟku yāṇṭu nāṉkāvatu It
tiruveṇ kāṭṭāṭiaruḷukinṟa
tevarkku Iraṉṉam caṭṭi
ṭiyum Iraṉṉam kaṭṭina
Ālaiyil Ip pon
na Alaiyil Añcum kuṭuttāṉ
Ālamattānāna kaliyuga
śva ran Ivaṉ kaikkoḷanBelow this are the following twenty-one lines which seems to form part of another record. .
Iṉnilam kalli tirutti Aṭai koṇṭu
mel Eṟṟaṭaiyāl pan=ta nellu Ivanikkoyi
lile tanmañ ceyyappeṟuvānāka paṇi
ttu kuṭuttom tevarkaṉmikaḷom Iva
n Innilam Aḻakitākak kallit tiritti mu
nnaṭai mel Ivan Eṟṟamāka Aṭutta ne
llu muppatin kalamum tā naṭaikoṇṭu
Aḷakkakaṭava nellu nālkalane tūṇiyu
m Āka nellu muppattu nāṟkalane tūṇi
yum rājakesariyāṟ Aḷakka Ittevar
ṭu kecanukku candrādittavaṟ nallāvūr Āntai
Aṭuttuk kuṭuttamaiyil Ivvaṭaippaṭi ne
llu Uṭaiyār paṇṭāratte Aḷantu Ivan vaic
ca caṭṭiccoṟu caṭṭi Onṟukku rājakesariyāṟ ne
llu nānāḻiyāka caṭṭicoṟu Iraṇṭukku nellu
kuṟuṇiyāka nāḷ munnūṟṟaṟupatinukku ne
llu muppatin kalamum Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum koṇṭu
candrātittavaṟ Innivantam celuttakkaṭavo
mānom Ittevarkanmikaḷom Ivai talaicca
ṅkāṭṭu karaṇattān paṟaṭaikāviti kalamanen neḻut
tu nāṅkūr karaṇattān kaṭaṟ� neḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 19.102 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
